description.RED: Aggressive Grilling: Red natural cards gain +2 base value
description.ORANGE: Cooler Scavenger: Claim lowest-value opponent card as Crew
description.YELLOW: Premature Face-Painting: Yellow Crew cards provide +4 instead of +2
description.GREEN: Weather Report: Resolved in Phase 1 via taunt
description.BLUE: Sleight of Paw: Swap Blue card value with opponent natural card
description.PURPLE: The Extra Lap: Return Purple card to hand, must play face-up next round
